name: Blackberry Brandy Sour Cream Jell-o Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jello in hot brandy and let it cool.
2. Combine the cooled Jello with Sour cream.
3. In a separate bowl, cream together Butter and Sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add Eggs one at a time to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in Vanilla, Lemon extract, Almond extract, and Rum flavoring into the butter mixture.
6. Gradually mix in dry ingredients with the cooled Jello-Sour cream mixture, alternating with the butter mixture; beat well after each addition.
7. Pour the batter into a prepared 10-inch tube or Bundt pan that has been greased and lightly floured.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 75 minutes.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 20 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to finish cooling.
10. Dust with sifted powdered sugar if desired.
